description: A perfect blend of comfort and style, this fila Hawai flip flop comes with soft rubber straps and a cushioned footbed, that will never make you want to glide out of them.UpperSoft rubber straps with a toe separator to lock the foot in place Cushioned textured PU footbed, with brand logo printed on the toe and heel regionOutsoleTPR outsole with brand logo styled lugs with brand name embossed in it for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
